assistant.welcome.message:
**Welcome! I’m the Library Assistant, an experimental AI-powered tool to help you explore the Sefaria Library. To get started, you can:**

- Ask me to find sources about a topic or theme
- Get help understanding a text
- Request a translation of a passage

_Like any AI system, I can make mistakes. Please verify responses with the original sources._

_Your feedback helps us improve. Use the 👍/👎 buttons to rate the quality of my responses._
assistant.welcome.restart: Let me know how I can help.
assistant.welcome.newSession:
**Welcome back! I’m ready to help you explore the Library. You can try things like:**

- Find me sources about gratitude
- Help me understand this text
- Translate this passage for me

_Your feedback on responses is always appreciated._
assistant.title: Library Assistant
assistant.empty.description: You can ask questions while you study.
assistant.empty.examples.label: For example:
assistant.empty.disclaimer: You’re trying our new Library Assistant. It uses AI and may make mistakes.
assistant.loading.delayed: This is taking a little longer than expected.
assistant.restart.title: Start a new chat?
assistant.restart.description: This will clear the current conversation.
assistant.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
assistant.error.network: We’re having trouble connecting. Check your internet connection and try again.
assistant.error.timeout: This is taking longer than expected.
assistant.timeout: This is taking a little longer than expected.
assistant.settings.title: Agent Settings
assistant.appetizer.sentence: While you wait, explore sources about {topics}.
assistant.source.readWhileWaiting: Found a source — read while you wait
assistant.limit.reached: The conversation has reached its limit.
assistant.limit.startNew: Start a new chat to keep exploring.
assistant.feedback.modal.title: Want to add more detail? (optional)
assistant.feedback.modal.subtitle: Your feedback helps us improve.
